prompt_text:
### Demographics: 60-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Major Depressive Disorder
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~1.2 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis), Letrozole (2.5 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 55.1 kg; Height 152.2 cm; BMI 23.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/85 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.4%; 9 months ago 10.0%; 6 months ago 9.5%; 3 months ago 9.0%; current 8.4%), FPG (12 months ago 300mg/dL; 9 months ago 284mg/dL; 6 months ago 247mg/dL; 3 months ago 252mg/dL; current 189mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 54.8kg; 9 months ago 51.8kg; 6 months ago 50.7kg; 3 months ago 51.8kg; current 55.1kg), Height (12 months ago 152.2cm; 9 months ago 152.2cm; 6 months ago 152.2cm; 3 months ago 152.2cm; current 152.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 23.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 135mmHg; 3 months ago 136mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 86mmHg; 9 months ago 86mmHg; 6 months ago 85mmHg; 3 months ago 85mmHg; current 85mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 28U/L; 9 months ago 35U/L; 6 months ago 26U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 30U/L), AST (12 months ago 29U/L; 9 months ago 25U/L; 6 months ago 27U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 23U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 101mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 75mg/g; 9 months ago 72mg/g; 6 months ago 76mg/g; 3 months ago 104mg/g; current 83mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 68mg/dL; 9 months ago 73mg/dL; 6 months ago 70mg/dL; 3 months ago 68mg/dL; current 71mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 50mg/dL; 6 months ago 54mg/dL; 3 months ago 50mg/dL; current 52mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 117mg/dL; 9 months ago 115mg/dL; 6 months ago 119mg/dL; 3 months ago 98mg/dL; current 108mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.8g/dL; 6 months ago 14.1g/dL; 3 months ago 14.8g/dL; current 14.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
